headline: ON Semiconductor Corp. (ON) Rises Higher Than Market: Key Facts
summary: ON Semiconductor Corp. (ON) concluded the recent trading session at $72.04, signifying a +1.44% move from its prior day's close.

headline: [Latest] Global Power Schottky Diode Market Size/Share Worth USD 8.14 Billion by 2035 at a 8.7% CAGR: Custom Market Insights (Analysis, Outlook, Leaders, Report, Trends, Forecast, Segmentation, Growth Rate, Value, SWOT Analysis)
summary: [220+ Pages Latest Report] According to a market research study published by Custom Market Insights, the demand analysis of Global Power Schottky Diode Market size & share revenue was valued at approximately USD 3.18 Billion in 2025 and is expected to reach USD 3.52 Billion in 2026 and is expected to reach around USD 8.14 Billion by 2035, at a CAGR of 8.7% between 2026 and 2035. The key market players listed in the report with their sales, revenues and strategies are Infineon Technologies AG, ON
